ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the year */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data record */,
  "date_dssat" INTEGER /* Date in DSSAT format (YYYYDDD) */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "prec" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "srad" REAL /* Solar radiation in MJ/m² */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover in percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record to track changes over time */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the station is located */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data reporting (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate zone of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation in millimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES climate_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the zone record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the zone record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the metadata belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "quality_check" TEXT /* Quality check status (e.g., verified, pending, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "quality_check_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metadata to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
